description_long: This is a modern, height-adjustable computer desk with a dark, sleek tabletop and sturdy black metal legs. The desk features a dual curved monitor setup, a mechanical keyboard, and a gaming mouse, all arranged neatly on the surface. Underneath the desk, a large black computer tower is positioned on the floor, with visible cabling and a power outlet nearby. The desk has RGB lighting accents along the edges, adding a vibrant, high-tech aesthetic. On the right side, there are additional USB ports or controls integrated into the desk's edge. The overall design is minimalist yet functional, optimized for a high-performance computing or gaming environment.
description: A modern, height-adjustable computer desk with dual curved monitors, RGB lighting, and a large PC tower beneath. The desk features a sleek dark surface and integrated tech-friendly elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual curved monitors, keyboard, mouse, and the PC tower beneath the desk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the desk, the curve of the monitors, and the RGB lighting along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the monitors, cable management, and the full size of the PC tower.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the desk's leg structure, the PC tower, and the edge-mounted USB ports or controls.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the monitors, keyboard, and mouse, while the back features the monitor stands and cable management; the right side has integrated USB ports.
attribute_usage_context: high-performance computer workstation or gaming setup
